title: 目標達成の後に・後援会！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To get Haru Urara more experienced, I've been
entering her into a variety of races. On one of her
days off...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ura la la! ♪ Heehee... That was such a fun walk!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I got to eat loads of snacks! Now I'm extra
ready for training tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Well, aren't you energetic, young lady!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Being energetic is my specialty!

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh, I see! Wait, are you an Umamusume by
any chance?

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: That means you run in those races, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I race a whole bunch! My name's Haru
Urara!

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara... Why, you're exactly like they say!

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course! I often go to the shopping district,
you see.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Everyone over there is over the moon about you.
They even created a Haru Urara Fan Club.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Over the moon? What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that it's an expression used to
describe the strong emotions a person feels for
another, and in this case, it shows how dedicated
her fans are.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see! Mm, actually, I still don't get it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But it means a lot of people are rooting for me,
right?

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, close enough. I'm starting to think about
joining, too.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Do it! Do it! Actually, can I join too?
choice_data_list:
You... want to join your own fan club to root for
yourself?

You... want to join your own fan club to root for
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, exactly! ...Wait, would that be weird?

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh, you're a funny one, that's for sure! I
can see why everyone adores you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After we say our goodbyes...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, I'm so happy. So many people like me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've got my own fan club, I gotta work
even harder!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The more her fanbase grows, the more motivated
Haru Urara gets.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Urara fans, let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she'll continue to gain experience in
different races while also growing her fanbase!
